arts.sum: Chelsea are keen on Lyon’s Enzo Molebe and could make efforts to sign him in the winter market. That’s according to Le Parisien, and they state the Blues have a ‘concrete interest’ in the forward. The 17-year-old came up through the ranks of the Ligue 1 side’s academy and Chelsea seem determined to sign him.
